content: Fastify route plugins in @sisu/server: do NOT use fastify-plugin fp() wrapper on route-only plugins — fp() causes 404s in vitest due to plugin name extraction issues. Export plain FastifyPluginAsync functions directly. Routes in encapsulated scopes still inherit parent decorations (storage) and are accessible via inject().

@sisu/server app factory (buildApp): must call await app.ready() before returning — Fastify v5 registers plugins asynchronously, app.ready() triggers plugin initialization so inject() and listen() work correctly.
